Our Administrative Staff Came Together at the Discussion and Evaluation Camp

25.09.2023

2023 consultation and evaluation camp was held with the participation of our administrative staff.

The second of our 2023 consultation and evaluation camps was held on September 22-24 on the Island of Democracy and Freedom with the participation of all our administrative staff.

At the opening of the camp, our Deputy Chairman of the Board of Trustees Necmeddin Bilal Erdoğan and our Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan made a greeting speech.

In his speech, Necmeddin Bilal Erdoğan stated that they strive to make Ibn Haldun University a peaceful university not only with its financial facilities and campus, but also with its working environment.

Our Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan emphasized that the culture that will make Ibn Haldun University an institution that will transcend centuries is built together and the necessity of increasing horizontal and vertical interactions within the institution.

The second day of the camp started with the opening speech of our general secretary Sebahattin Belik, followed by the presentations of our unit managers and the seminar on "The Effects of Emotional Resilience on Communication and Intrinsic Motivation". The last session of the second day of the camp was devoted to the workshop on "The Effects of Administrative Services on Student and Academic Satisfaction".

The Administrative Staff Consultation and Evaluation Camp ended on Sunday, September 24th with the closing speech of our Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan after the workshop evaluations of our Secretary General Sebahattin Belik, Deputy Secretaries General Turgut Aydın and Kemal Sarı and the presentations of our new staff members.
